svg.title: Multimodal AI Platform Architecture
svg.desc: End-to-end flowchart of a multimodal AI platform with RAG, streaming, and MLOps monitoring layer

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the data sources in this architecture')
sendPrompt('How does Kafka work in a streaming AI pipeline?')
sendPrompt('What does the text cleaning step do in the pipeline?')
sendPrompt('How is image processing done in this multimodal pipeline?')
sendPrompt('What metadata is extracted in this pipeline?')
sendPrompt('What is CLIP and how are embeddings generated in this pipeline?')
sendPrompt('How does FAISS vector search work?')
sendPrompt('What is a cross encoder and how does re-ranking improve RAG?')
sendPrompt('How is the LLM layer integrated with the RAG pipeline?')
sendPrompt('How is FastAPI used to serve the AI model?')
sendPrompt('What does the frontend UI look like for this platform?')
sendPrompt('How does MLflow model tracking work?')
sendPrompt('How is data drift detected in ML pipelines?')
sendPrompt('What triggers auto-retraining in an MLOps pipeline?')
sendPrompt('How is Docker used for ML model deployment?')
